name: BookingBot
description: A simple hotel room booking bot

sample_utterances: I want to book a room

confirmation_prompt.message: Just to confirm — you want a {RoomType} room checking in on {CheckInDate} for {Nights} nights. Is that right?

confirmation_response.message: Great, your booking is confirmed. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

declination_response.message: No problem. Let me know if you would like to make a different booking.

closing_prompt.message: Thank you for choosing us. Is there anything else I can help you with?

RoomType.prompt: What type of room would you like — single, double, or suite?

CheckInDate.prompt: What date would you like to check in?

Nights.prompt: How many nights will you be staying?

sample_utterances: I want to cancel my reservation

confirmation_prompt.message: Are you sure you want to cancel your booking with reference {BookingRef}?

declination_response.message: Your booking has not been cancelled. Let me know if you need anything else.

BookingRef.prompt: Please provide your booking reference number.
